compatible_devices.notes: 12 NEMA 6-15 outlets at 240V/5A max each (~1200W per outlet); 3 banks of 4 with 30-sec staggered start; 60A total max ballast load; requires 80A main supply; single 120V trigger cord input requires external timer or controller (not included); any 240V HID ballast with NEMA 6-15 plug is plug-and-play; on/off relay only — no dimming; North American NEMA 6-15 standard — European equipment requires adapter

compatible_devices.compatible_brand: Universal (any LED brand with 240V NEMA 6-15 plug)
compatible_devices.notes: On/off relay switching only via NEMA 6-15 outlet; no 0-10V, PWM, or any dimming protocol support; LED driver must have a 240V NEMA 6-15 plug; not the primary intended use — Autopilot markets this exclusively as an HID light controller; technically functional as a dumb relay switch for any 240V LED load within 5A/outlet
